wikiCards.name: The Charismatic Song
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll to use a Hero card's effect, +1 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: The Cloaked Sage
wikiCards.effect: Each time you play a Magic card, DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: The Divine Arrow
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll to ATTACK a Monster card, +1 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: The Fist of Reason
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll to CHALLENGE, +2 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: The Protecting Horn
wikiCards.effect: Each time you play a Modifier card on a roll, +1 or -1 to that roll.

wikiCards.name: The Shadow Claw
wikiCards.effect: Once per turn on your turn, you may spend an action point to pull a card from another player's hand.

wikiCards.name: Abyss Queen
wikiCards.effect: Each time another player plays a Modifier card on one of your rolls, +1 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: Anuran Cauldron
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll, +1 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: Artic Aries
wikiCards.effect: Each time you successfully roll to use a Hero's effect, DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Bloodwing
wikiCards.effect: Each time another player CHALLENGES you, that player must DISCARD a card.

wikiCards.name: Corrupted Sabretooth
wikiCards.effect: Each time you would DESTROY a Hero card, you may STEAL that Hero card instead.

wikiCards.name: Crowned Serpent
wikiCards.effect: Each time any player (including you) plays a Modifier card, you may DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Dark Dragon King
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll for a Hero card's effect, +1 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: Dracos
wikiCards.effect: Each time a Hero card in your Party is destroyed, you may DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Malamammoth
wikiCards.effect: Each time you DRAW an item card, you may play it immediately

wikiCards.name: Mega Slime
wikiCards.effect: You may spend an extra action point on each of your turns.

wikiCards.name: Orthus
wikiCards.effect: Each time you DRAW a Magic card, you may play it immediately.

wikiCards.name: Rex Major
wikiCards.effect: Each time you DRAW a Modifier card, you may reveal it and DRAW a second card.

wikiCards.name: Terratuga
wikiCards.effect: Your Hero cards cannot be destroyed.

wikiCards.name: Titan Wyvern
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll for a Challenge card, +1 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: Warworn Owlbear
wikiCards.effect: Item cards you play cannot be challenged

wikiCards.name: Bad Axe
wikiCards.effect: DESTROY a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Bear Claw
wikiCards.effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If it is a Hero card, pull a second card from that player's hand.

wikiCards.name: Beary Wise
wikiCards.effect: Each other player must DISCARD a card. Choose one of the discarded cards and add it to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Fury Knuckle
wikiCards.effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If it is a Challenge card, pull a second card from that player's hand.

wikiCards.name: Heavy Bear
wikiCards.effect: Choose a player. That player must DISCARD 2 cards.

wikiCards.name: Pan Chucks
wikiCards.effect: DRAW 2 cards. If at least one of those cards is a Challenge card, you may reveal it, then DESTROY a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Qi Bear
wikiCards.effect: DISCARD up to 3 cards. For each card discarded, DESTROY a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Tough Teddy
wikiCards.effect: Each other player with a Fighter in their Party must DISCARD a card.

wikiCards.name: Dodgy Dealer
wikiCards.effect: Trade hands with another player.

wikiCards.name: Fuzzy Cheeks
wikiCards.effect: DRAW a card and play a Hero card from your hand immediately.

wikiCards.name: Greedy Cheeks
wikiCards.effect: Each other player must give you a card from their hand.

wikiCards.name: Lucky Bucky
wikiCards.effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If that card is a Hero card, you may play it immediately

wikiCards.name: Mellow Dee
wikiCards.effect: DRAW a card. If that card is a Hero card, you may play it immediately.

wikiCards.name: Napping Nibbles
wikiCards.effect: Do nothing.

wikiCards.name: Peanut
wikiCards.effect: DRAW 2 cards.

wikiCards.name: Tipsy Tootie
wikiCards.effect: Choose a player. STEAL a Hero card from that player's Party and move Tipsy Tootie to that player's Party.

wikiCards.name: Calming Voice
wikiCards.effect: Hero cards in your Party cannot be stolen until your next turn.

wikiCards.name: Guiding Light
wikiCards.effect: Search the discard pile for a Hero card and add it to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Holy Curselifter
wikiCards.effect: Return a Cursed Item card equipped to a Hero card in your Party to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Iron Resolve
wikiCards.effect: Cards you play cannot be challenged for the rest of your turn.

wikiCards.name: Mighty Blade
wikiCards.effect: Hero cards in your Party cannot be destroyed until your next turn.

wikiCards.name: Radiant Horn
wikiCards.effect: Search the discard pile for a Modifier card and add it it to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Vibrant Glow
wikiCards.effect: +5 to all your rolls until the end of your turn.

wikiCards.name: Wise Shield
wikiCards.effect: +3 to all your rolls until the end of your turn.

wikiCards.name: Bullseye
wikiCards.effect: Look at the top 3 cards of the deck. Add one to your hand, then return the other two to the top of the deck in any order.

wikiCards.name: Hook
wikiCards.effect: Play an item card from your hand immediately and DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Lookie Rookie
wikiCards.effect: Search the discard pile for an item card and add it to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Quick Draw
wikiCards.effect: DRAW 2 cards. If at least one of those cards is an item card, you may play one of them immediately.

wikiCards.name: Serious Grey
wikiCards.effect: DESTROY a Hero and DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Sharp Fox
wikiCards.effect: Look at another player's hand

wikiCards.name: Wildshot
wikiCards.effect: DRAW 3 cards and DISCARD a card.

wikiCards.name: Wily Red
wikiCards.effect: DRAW cards until you have 7 cards in your hand.

wikiCards.name: Kit Napper
wikiCards.effect: STEAL a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Meowzio
wikiCards.effect: Choose a player. STEAL a Hero from that player and pull a card from that player's hand.

wikiCards.name: Plundering Puma
wikiCards.effect: Pull 2 cards from another player's hand. That player may DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Shurikitty
wikiCards.effect: DESTROY a Hero card. If that Hero card had an item card equipped to it, add that item card to your hand instead of moving it to the discard pile.

wikiCards.name: Silent Shadow
wikiCards.effect: Look at another player's hand. Choose a card and add it to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Slippery Paws
wikiCards.effect: Pull 2 cards from another player's hand, then DISCARD one of those cards.

wikiCards.name: Sly Pickings
wikiCards.effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If that card is an item card, you may play it immediately.

wikiCards.name: Smooth Mimimeow
wikiCards.effect: Pull a card from the hand of each other player with a Thief in their Party.

wikiCards.name: Bun Bun
wikiCards.effect: Search the discard pile for a Magic card and add it to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Buttons
wikiCards.effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If it is a Magic card, you may play it immediately.

wikiCards.name: Fluffy
wikiCards.effect: DESTROY 2 Hero cards

wikiCards.name: Hopper
wikiCards.effect: Choose a player. That player must SACRIFICE a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Snowball
wikiCards.effect: DRAW a card. If it is a Magic card, you may play it immediately and DRAW a second card.

wikiCards.name: Spooky
wikiCards.effect: Each other player must SACRIFICE a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Whiskers
wikiCards.effect: STEAL a Hero card and DESTROY a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Wiggles
wikiCards.effect: STEAL a Hero and roll to use its effect immediately

wikiCards.name: Bard Mask
wikiCards.effect: The equipped Hero card is considered a Bard instead of its original class.

wikiCards.name: Decoy Doll
wikiCards.effect: If the equipped Hero card would be sacrificed or destroyed, move Decoy Doll to the discard pile instead.

wikiCards.name: Fighter Mask
wikiCards.effect: The equipped Hero card is considered a Fighter instead of its original class.

wikiCards.name: Guardian Mask
wikiCards.effect: The equipped Hero card is considered a Guardian instead of its original class.

wikiCards.name: Particularly Rusty Coin
wikiCards.effect: If you unsuccessfully roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Ranger Mask
wikiCards.effect: The equipped Hero card is considered a Ranger instead of its original class.

wikiCards.name: Really Big Ring
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, +2 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: Thief Mask
wikiCards.effect: The equipped Hero card is considered a Thief instead of its original class.

wikiCards.name: Wizard Mask
wikiCards.effect: The equipped Hero card is considered a Wizard instead of its original class.

wikiCards.name: Curse of the Snake's Eyes
wikiCards.effect: Each time you roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, -2 to your roll.

wikiCards.name: Sealing Key
wikiCards.effect: You cannot use the equipped Hero card's effect.

wikiCards.name: Suspiciously Shiny Coin
wikiCards.effect: If you successfully roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, DISCARD a card.

wikiCards.name: Modifier +1/-3
wikiCards.effect: Play this card after any player (including you) rolls the dice. +1 or -3 to that roll.

wikiCards.name: Modifier +2/-2
wikiCards.effect: Play this card after any player (including you) rolls the dice. +2 or -2 to that roll.

wikiCards.name: Modifier +3/-1
wikiCards.effect: Play this card after any player (including you) rolls the dice. +3 or -1 to that roll.

wikiCards.name: Modifier +4
wikiCards.effect: Play this card after any player (including you) rolls the dice. +4 to that roll.

wikiCards.name: Modifier -4
wikiCards.effect: Play this card after any player (including you) rolls the dice. -4 to that roll.

wikiCards.name: Call to the Fallen
wikiCards.effect: Search the discard pile for a Hero card and add it to your hand.

wikiCards.name: Critical Boost
wikiCards.effect: DRAW 3 cards and DISCARD a card.

wikiCards.name: Destructive Spell
wikiCards.effect: DISCARD a card, then DESTROY a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Enchanted Spell
wikiCards.effect: +2 to all of your rolls until the end of your turn.

wikiCards.name: Entangling Trap
wikiCards.effect: DISCARD 2 cards, then STEAL a Hero card.

wikiCards.name: Forced Exchange
wikiCards.effect: Choose a player. STEAL a Hero card from that player's Party, then move a Hero card from your Party to that player's Party.

wikiCards.name: Forceful Winds
wikiCards.effect: Return every equipped item card to its respective player's hand.

wikiCards.name: Winds of Change
wikiCards.effect: Return an Item card equipped to any player's Hero card to that player's hand, then DRAW a card.

wikiCards.name: Challenge
wikiCards.effect: You may play this card when another player attempts to play a Hero, Item, or Magic card. CHALLENGE that card.

You may spend an extra action point on each of your turns.

(Specific Rule: Once defeated, you gain the monster ability. You may spend the extra action on the turn it is defeated.)
